title: Meta-RL Full Paper Sweep
adapter_boundary: Meta-RL outputs only bounded delta_P_eng_on and delta_SOC_ref; map/rule EMS keeps engine-state and power-split authority.
claim: production-like EMS task-aware calibration adapter improves SOC regulation and constraint robustness under unseen driving conditions
verdict: Completed and stable; improvements are positive on heldout averages but too small for the current strong paper success thresholds.

metadata.oracle_definition: discretized bounded-offset DP oracle over delta_P_eng_on and delta_SOC_ref; map/rule EMS keeps engine-state and power-split authority
metadata.frontier_cap_note: If frontier_cap_hit is true, the oracle is frontier-capped within the discretized bounded-offset search.
